<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="FORGE">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0A0A0A">
<meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<title>FORGE</title>
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
html,body{background:#0A0A0A;color:#F0EDE8;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;min-height:100vh;overscroll-behavior:none}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#0A0A0A}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#1E1E1E}
button{outline:none;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.fade-up{animation:fadeUp 0.3s ease forwards}
.app{max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;min-height:100vh;position:relative;background:#0A0A0A}
.topbar{padding:16px 20px 14px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-bottom:1px solid #161616}
.topbar-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.app-title{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:28px;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#F0EDE8;line-height:1}
.app-date{font-size:9px;color:#333;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px}
.live-badge{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.1em;border-radius:2px;padding:4px 10px;text-transform:uppercase;display:none}
.day-tabs{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid #161616;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none}
.day-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.day-tab{flex:1;min-width:70px;padding:14px 8px;border:none;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s}
.day-tab-lbl{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px}
.day-tab-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:.05em}
.day-hero{padding:20px 20px 14px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start}
.day-tag{display:inline-block;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.15em;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px}
.day-title{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:32px;letter-spacing:.03em;line-height:1}
.prog-count{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:32px;line-height:1;text-align:right}
.prog-track{width:72px;height:3px;background:#1A1A1A;border-radius:2px;margin-top:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-left:auto}
.prog-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;transition:width .4s ease}
.ex-wrap{padding:0 12px}
.ex-hdr{display:grid;grid-template-columns:28px 1fr 38px 58px 42px;gap:8px;padding:6px 12px;color:#2E2E2E;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid #141414;margin-bottom:4px}
.ex-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:28px 1fr 38px 58px 42px;gap:8px;padding:13px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid #111;align-items:center;cursor:pointer;transition:opacity .2s;border-radius:4px}
.ex-row.done{opacity:.35}
.chk{width:20px;height:20px;border:1.5px solid #222;border-radius:3px;background:transparent;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .2s}
.chkmark{font-size:11px;display:none}
.chk.on .chkmark{display:block}
.ex-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#D0CCC6;margin-bottom:2px}
.ex-row.done .ex-name{text-decoration:line-through;color:#3A3A3A}
.ex-note{font-size:10px;color:#2E2E2E}
.ex-sets{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:20px;text-align:center}
.ex-reps{font-size:10px;color:#666;text-align:center}
.ex-rest{font-size:10px;color:#444;text-align:center}
.finish-wrap{padding:24px 20px 0}
.finish-btn{width:100%;padding:16px;border:1px solid #2A2A2A;color:#555;font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:20px;letter-spacing:.1em;cursor:pointer;border-radius:4px;transition:all .3s;background:transparent}
.rest-timer{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:100%;max-width:480px;background:#0D0D0D;padding:16px 24px;z-index:100;display:none;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.rest-timer.on{display:flex}
.t-lbl{font-size:10px;color:#555;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px}
.t-txt{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:22px;color:#F0EDE8;letter-spacing:.05em}
.t-btn{padding:8px 14px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;cursor:pointer;border-radius:3px}
.bottom-nav{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:100%;max-width:480px;background:#0A0A0A;border-top:1px solid #161616;display:flex;z-index:99}
.nav-btn{flex:1;padding:14px 8px 18px;border:none;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;border-top:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s}
.nav-icon{font-size:16px;margin-bottom:3px;color:#333}
.nav-lbl{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#333}
.stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin-bottom:28px}
.stat-card{background:#111;border:1px solid #1A1A1A;border-radius:4px;padding:14px 12px}
.stat-val{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:28px;color:#F0EDE8;line-height:1}
.stat-lbl{font-size:9px;color:#444;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px}
.hist-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:14px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #111}
.hist-badge{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
.hist-name{font-size:13px;color:#C8C4BE;margin-bottom:3px}
.hist-meta{font-size:10px;color:#444}
.mini-bar{height:3px;background:#1A1A1A;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:4px}
.mini-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px}
.hist-pct{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:22px}
.empty{text-align:center;color:#2A2A2A;padding:60px 0;font-size:13px;line-height:1.8}
.prog-card{background:#111;border:1px solid #1A1A1A;border-radius:4px;padding:18px;margin-bottom:16px}
.prog-day-card{background:#0D0D0D;border:1px solid #161616;border-radius:4px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:10px}
.sec-title{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:36px;margin-bottom:20px;letter-spacing:.03em}
.sec-lbl{font-size:10px;color:#333;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px}
.pp{padding:24px 20px}
.spacer{height:80px}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="app">
  <div class="topbar">
    <div class="topbar-left">
      <svg width="38" height="38" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" id="forge-icon">
        <rect x="8" y="32" width="32" height="8" rx="2" fill="#E8FF47" fill-opacity="0.15" stroke="#E8FF47" stroke-width="1.2"/>
        <path d="M12 32 L14 20 L34 20 L36 32 Z" fill="#E8FF47" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="#E8FF47" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        <path d="M14 20 Q8 20 6 24 L12 24 Z" fill="#E8FF47" fill-opacity="0.18" stroke="#E8FF47" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
        <line x1="30" y1="18" x2="42" y2="6" stroke="#E8FF47" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/>
        <rect x="24" y="10" width="12" height="7" rx="1.5" transform="rotate(-45 30 13.5)" fill="#E8FF47" stroke="#E8FF47" stroke-width="0.5"/>
        <circle cx="26" cy="7" r="1.2" fill="#E8FF47" opacity="0.9"/>
        <circle cx="31" cy="4" r="0.8" fill="#E8FF47" opacity="0.6"/>
        <circle cx="22" cy="10" r="0.7" fill="#E8FF47" opacity="0.5"/>
        <circle cx="36" cy="9" r="1" fill="#E8FF47" opacity="0.7"/>
      </svg>
      <div>
        <div class="app-title">FORGE<span id="tdot" style="color:#E8FF47">.</span></div>
        <div class="app-date" id="app-date"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="live-badge" id="live-badge"></div>
  </div>

  <div id="content" class="fade-up"></div>

  <div class="rest-timer" id="rest-timer">
    <div style="position:relative;width:52px;height:52px;flex-shrink:0">
      <svg width="52" height="52" style="transform:rotate(-90deg)">
        <circle cx="26" cy="26" r="22" fill="none" stroke="#1A1A1A" stroke-width="3"/>
        <circle cx="26" cy="26" r="22" fill="none" stroke="#E8FF47" stroke-width="3" id="t-arc" stroke-dasharray="138.2" stroke-dashoffset="0"/>
      </svg>
      <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Bebas Neue';font-size:16px" id="t-num"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="flex:1">
      <div class="t-lbl">Rest Timer</div>
      <div class="t-txt" id="t-txt"></div>
    </div>
    <button class="t-btn" id="t-skip" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid #2A2A2A;color:#555">Skip</button>
    <button class="t-btn" id="t-pause">Pause</button>
  </div>

  <div class="bottom-nav">
    <button class="nav-btn" id="nb-today" onclick="setView('today')">
      <div class="nav-icon" id="ni-today">&#9672;</div>
      <div class="nav-lbl" id="nl-today">Today</div>
    </button>
    <button class="nav-btn" id="nb-history" onclick="setView('history')">
      <div class="nav-icon" id="ni-history">&#8801;</div>
      <div class="nav-lbl" id="nl-history">History</div>
    </button>
    <button class="nav-btn" id="nb-progress" onclick="setView('progress')">
      <div class="nav-icon" id="ni-progress">&#8599;</div>
      <div class="nav-lbl" id="nl-progress">Progress</div>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const PLAN=[
  {id:"push",day:"Day 1",label:"Push",tag:"Chest · Shoulders · Triceps",color:"#E8FF47",exercises:[
    {name:"DB Bench Press",sets:4,reps:"8–10",rest:90,note:"3s lowering"},
    {name:"Incline DB Press",sets:3,reps:"10–12",rest:75,note:"30° incline"},
    {name:"DB Lateral Raises",sets:4,reps:"12–15",rest:60,note:"Partial on last set"},
    {name:"DB Overhead Press",sets:3,reps:"10–12",rest:75,note:"Seated or standing"},
    {name:"DB Skull Crushers",sets:3,reps:"12–15",rest:60,note:"Elbows tucked"},
    {name:"DB Chest Flyes",sets:3,reps:"12–15",rest:60,note:"Stretch at bottom"}]},
  {id:"pull",day:"Day 2",label:"Pull",tag:"Back · Biceps · Rear Delts",color:"#47FFDB",exercises:[
    {name:"DB Bent-Over Row",sets:4,reps:"8–10",rest:90,note:"Row to hip"},
    {name:"Single-Arm DB Row",sets:3,reps:"10–12 ea",rest:75,note:"Full ROM"},
    {name:"DB Reverse Flyes",sets:4,reps:"12–15",rest:60,note:"Rear delt focus"},
    {name:"Incline DB Curl",sets:3,reps:"10–12",rest:60,note:"Long head stretch"},
    {name:"Hammer Curls",sets:3,reps:"12–15",rest:60,note:"No swing"},
    {name:"DB Pullover",sets:3,reps:"12–15",rest:60,note:"Lat stretch"}]},
  {id:"legs",day:"Day 3",label:"Legs",tag:"Quads · Hamstrings · Glutes · Calves",color:"#FF6B35",exercises:[
    {name:"DB Goblet Squat",sets:4,reps:"10–12",rest:90,note:"Heels elevated"},
    {name:"DB Romanian Deadlift",sets:4,reps:"10–12",rest:90,note:"Feel hamstrings"},
    {name:"DB Bulgarian Split Squat",sets:3,reps:"10 ea",rest:75,note:"Front foot forward"},
    {name:"DB Sumo Squat",sets:3,reps:"12–15",rest:60,note:"Wide stance"},
    {name:"DB Step-Up",sets:3,reps:"12 ea",rest:60,note:"Drive through heel"},
    {name:"Standing Calf Raises",sets:4,reps:"15–20",rest:45,note:"Slow & controlled"}]},
  {id:"full",day:"Day 4",label:"Full Body",tag:"Compound Power + Core",color:"#C47FFF",exercises:[
    {name:"DB Thrusters",sets:4,reps:"10–12",rest:90,note:"Squat to press"},
    {name:"DB Renegade Row",sets:3,reps:"8 ea",rest:75,note:"Hips square"},
    {name:"DB Deadlift",sets:4,reps:"8–10",rest:90,note:"Keep bar close"},
    {name:"DB Farmer Carry",sets:3,reps:"40m",rest:60,note:"Grip + core"},
    {name:"DB Suitcase Crunch",sets:3,reps:"15–20",rest:45,note:"Deliberate"},
    {name:"DB Turkish Get-Up",sets:2,reps:"3 ea",rest:90,note:"Light, focus form"}]}
];

let view='today',dayIdx=0,checked={},log={},sessStart=null,sessActive=false;
let tInt=null,tRem=0,tTotal=0,tRun=false,tColor='#E8FF47';

const store={
  get:k=>{try{const v=localStorage.getItem(k);return v?JSON.parse(v):null}catch{return null}},
  set:(k,v)=>{try{localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify(v))}catch{}}
};
const todayStr=()=>new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
const fmtDate=s=>{const d=new Date(s+'T12:00:00');return d.toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'short',day:'numeric'})};
const fmtDur=s=>`${Math.floor(s/60)}:${String(s%60).padStart(2,'0')}`;
const plan=()=>PLAN[dayIdx];
const col=()=>plan().color;
const done=()=>plan().exercises.filter((_,i)=>checked[i]).length;

function loadChecked(){checked=store.get('forge_ck_'+todayStr()+'_'+dayIdx)||{}}
function saveChecked(){store.set('forge_ck_'+todayStr()+'_'+dayIdx,checked)}
function loadLog(){log=store.get('forge_log')||{}}
function saveLog(){store.set('forge_log',log)}

// TIMER
function startTimer(s,c){
  clearInterval(tInt);tTotal=s;tRem=s;tColor=c;tRun=true;
  const el=document.getElementById('rest-timer');
  el.style.borderTop='1px solid '+c+'40';el.classList.add('on');
  document.getElementById('t-arc').setAttribute('stroke',c);
  document.getElementById('t-num').style.color=c;
  document.getElementById('t-pause').style.cssText='background:'+c+'18;border:1px solid '+c+'40;color:'+c+';border-radius:3px';
  updateTimerUI();
  document.getElementById('bottom-nav').style.bottom='88px';
  tInt=setInterval(()=>{if(!tRun)return;tRem--;if(tRem<=0){stopTimer();return}updateTimerUI()},1000);
}
function updateTimerUI(){
  const pct=(tTotal-tRem)/tTotal;
  document.getElementById('t-arc').setAttribute('stroke-dashoffset',138.2*(1-pct));
  document.getElementById('t-num').textContent=tRem;
  document.getElementById('t-txt').textContent=fmtDur(tRem)+' remaining';
  document.getElementById('t-pause').textContent=tRun?'Pause':'Resume';
}
function stopTimer(){
  clearInterval(tInt);
  document.getElementById('rest-timer').classList.remove('on');
  document.getElementById('bottom-nav').style.bottom='0';
}
document.getElementById('t-skip').onclick=stopTimer;
document.getElementById('t-pause').onclick=()=>{tRun=!tRun;updateTimerUI()};

// NAV
function setView(v){
  view=v;
  ['today','history','progress'].forEach(id=>{
    const on=id===v;
    document.getElementById('ni-'+id).style.color=on?col():'#333';
    document.getElementById('nl-'+id).style.color=on?col():'#333';
    document.getElementById('nb-'+id).style.borderTopColor=on?col():'transparent';
  });
  render();
}

function applyColor(){
  const c=col();
  document.getElementById('tdot').style.color=c;
  const icon=document.getElementById('forge-icon');
  icon.querySelectorAll('[stroke]').forEach(e=>{if(e.getAttribute('stroke')==='#E8FF47'||e.getAttribute('stroke')===tColor||true){e.setAttribute('stroke',c)}});
  icon.querySelectorAll('[fill]').forEach(e=>{const f=e.getAttribute('fill');if(f&&f.startsWith('#')&&f!='none'){e.setAttribute('fill',c)}});
  const lb=document.getElementById('live-badge');
  lb.style.color=c;lb.style.border='1px solid '+c+'30';
}

function render(){
  applyColor();
  const el=document.getElementById('content');
  el.classList.remove('fade-up');void el.offsetWidth;el.classList.add('fade-up');
  if(view==='today')el.innerHTML=renderToday();
  if(view==='history')el.innerHTML=renderHistory();
  if(view==='progress')el.innerHTML=renderProgress();
  if(view==='today'){bindEx();bindFinish()}
}

function renderToday(){
  const p=plan(),c=col(),d=done(),tot=p.exercises.length,pct=(d/tot*100).toFixed(0);
  const tabs=PLAN.map((x,i)=>`<button class="day-tab" onclick="switchDay(${i})" style="border-bottom-color:${i===dayIdx?x.color:'transparent'}"><div class="day-tab-lbl" style="color:${i===dayIdx?x.color:'#383838'}">${x.day}</div><div class="day-tab-name" style="color:${i===dayIdx?x.color:'#383838'}">${x.label}</div></button>`).join('');
  const rows=p.exercises.map((ex,i)=>`<div class="ex-row ${checked[i]?'done':''}" data-i="${i}" data-r="${ex.rest}"><div class="chk ${checked[i]?'on':''}" style="${checked[i]?'border-color:'+c+';background:'+c+'25':''}"><span class="chkmark" style="color:${c}">&#10003;</span></div><div><div class="ex-name">${ex.name}</div><div class="ex-note">${ex.note}</div></div><div class="ex-sets" style="color:${c}">${ex.sets}</div><div class="ex-reps">${ex.reps}</div><div class="ex-rest">${ex.rest}s</div></div>`).join('');
  const fb=d>0?`<div class="finish-wrap"><button class="finish-btn" id="finish-btn" style="${d===tot?'background:'+c+';border-color:'+c+';color:#0A0A0A':'border-color:#2A2A2A;color:#555'}">${d===tot?'&#10003; COMPLETE &mdash; LOG WORKOUT':'LOG WORKOUT ('+d+'/'+tot+')'}</button></div>`:'';
  return `<div class="day-tabs">${tabs}</div><div class="day-hero"><div><div class="day-tag" style="background:${c}15;border:1px solid ${c}35;color:${c}">${p.tag}</div><div class="day-title">${p.label.toUpperCase()} DAY</div>${sessActive?'<div style="font-size:10px;color:#444;margin-top:6px;letter-spacing:.1em">&#9679; SESSION ACTIVE</div>':''}</div><div><div class="prog-count" style="color:${c}">${d}<span style="color:#333">/${tot}</span></div><div class="prog-track"><div class="prog-fill" style="width:${pct}%;background:${c}"></div></div></div></div><div class="ex-wrap"><div class="ex-hdr"><div></div><div>Exercise</div><div style="text-align:center">Sets</div><div style="text-align:center">Reps</div><div style="text-align:center">Rest</div></div>${rows}</div>${fb}<div class="spacer"></div>`;
}

function bindEx(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.ex-row').forEach(row=>{
    row.onclick=()=>{
      const i=+row.dataset.i,r=+row.dataset.r;
      checked[i]=!checked[i];saveChecked();
      if(checked[i]&&!sessActive){sessStart=Date.now();sessActive=true}
      if(checked[i])startTimer(r,col());else stopTimer();
      render();
    };
  });
}

function bindFinish(){
  const btn=document.getElementById('finish-btn');
  if(!btn)return;
  btn.onclick=()=>{
    const p=plan(),dur=sessStart?Math.round((Date.now()-sessStart)/1000):0;
    log[todayStr()+'_'+p.id]={date:todayStr(),dayId:p.id,dayLabel:p.label,color:p.color,completed:done(),total:p.exercises.length,duration:dur};
    saveLog();sessActive=false;sessStart=null;stopTimer();
    document.getElementById('live-badge').style.display='none';
    setView('history');
  };
}

function switchDay(i){dayIdx=i;loadChecked();stopTimer();render()}

function renderHistory(){
  const entries=Object.values(log).sort((a,b)=>b.date.localeCompare(a.date));
  let streak=0;const dw=new Set(entries.map(e=>e.date));let cd=new Date();
  while(true){const ds=cd.toISOString().split('T')[0];if(dw.has(ds)){streak++;cd.setDate(cd.getDate()-1)}else break}
  const rows=entries.length===0?'<div class="empty">No workouts logged yet.<br>Complete your first session<br>to start your history.</div>':entries.map(e=>`<div class="hist-row"><div class="hist-badge" style="background:${e.color}18;border:1px solid ${e.color}30"><div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue';font-size:11px;color:${e.color};text-align:center;line-height:1.2">${e.dayLabel.slice(0,4)}</div></div><div style="flex:1"><div class="hist-name">${e.dayLabel} Day</div><div class="hist-meta">${fmtDate(e.date)} &middot; ${e.completed}/${e.total} exercises${e.duration>0?' &middot; '+fmtDur(e.duration):''}</div><div class="mini-bar"><div class="mini-fill" style="width:${Math.round(e.completed/e.total*100)}%;background:${e.color}"></div></div></div><div class="hist-pct" style="color:${e.completed===e.total?e.color:'#333'}">${Math.round(e.completed/e.total*100)}%</div></div>`).join('');
  return `<div class="pp"><div class="sec-title">HISTORY</div><div class="stats-grid"><div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-val">${entries.length}</div><div class="stat-lbl">Workouts</div></div><div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-val">${entries.reduce((s,e)=>s+e.completed,0)}</div><div class="stat-lbl">Exercises</div></div><div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-val">${streak}d</div><div class="stat-lbl">Streak</div></div></div><div class="sec-lbl">Recent Sessions</div>${rows}<div class="spacer"></div></div>`;
}

function spark(data,c,w,h){
  if(!data||data.length<2)return '<div style="width:'+w+'px;height:'+h+'px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#222;font-size:10px">&#8211;</div>';
  const mx=Math.max(...data),mn=Math.min(...data),rng=mx-mn||1;
  const pts=data.map((v,i)=>`${(i/(data.length-1))*w},${h-((v-mn)/rng)*(h-6)-3}`).join(' ');
  const lx=w,ly=h-((data[data.length-1]-mn)/rng)*(h-6)-3;
  return `<svg width="${w}" height="${h}"><polyline points="${pts}" fill="none" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="${lx}" cy="${ly}" r="3" fill="${c}"/></svg>`;
}

function renderProgress(){
  const entries=Object.values(log);
  const byDay={};PLAN.forEach(p=>{byDay[p.id]=entries.filter(e=>e.dayId===p.id).sort((a,b)=>a.date.localeCompare(b.date))});
  const wm={};entries.forEach(e=>{const d=new Date(e.date+'T12:00:00');const w=d.getFullYear()+'-W'+String(Math.ceil((d.getDate()+new Date(d.getFullYear(),d.getMonth(),1).getDay())/7)).padStart(2,'0');wm[w]=(wm[w]||0)+1});
  const wd=Object.entries(wm).sort().slice(-8).map(([,v])=>v);
  const cards=PLAN.map(p=>{const de=byDay[p.id]||[];const avg=de.length>0?Math.round(de.reduce((s,e)=>s+(e.completed/e.total)*100,0)/de.length):0;const sd=de.map(e=>Math.round((e.completed/e.total)*100));return `<div class="prog-day-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px"><div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;margin-bottom:3px"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:${p.color};display:inline-block;margin-right:8px"></span><span style="font-size:12px;color:#C8C4BE">${p.label} Day</span></div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#333">${de.length} session${de.length!==1?'s':''} logged</div></div><div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:6px"><div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue';font-size:24px;color:${de.length>0?p.color:'#222'}">${de.length>0?avg+'%':'&#8212;'}</div>${spark(sd.length>1?sd:null,p.color,80,28)}</div></div><div style="height:3px;background:#1A1A1A;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden"><div style="height:100%;width:${avg}%;background:${p.color};border-radius:2px;transition:width .6s ease"></div></div></div>`}).join('');
  const empty=entries.length===0?'<div class="empty">Log workouts to see<br>your progress charts here.</div>':'';
  return `<div class="pp"><div class="sec-title">PROGRESS</div><div class="prog-card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:14px"><div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#444;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">Weekly Sessions</div><div style="font-family:'Bebas Neue';font-size:28px;color:#F0EDE8">${wd[wd.length-1]||0} <span style="font-size:14px;color:#444">this week</span></div></div>${spark(wd.length>0?wd:[0,0],'#E8FF47',100,40)}</div></div><div class="sec-lbl">Completion by Day</div>${cards}${empty}<div class="spacer"></div></div>`;
}

// INIT
document.getElementById('app-date').textContent=new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US',{weekday:'long',month:'short',day:'numeric'});
loadLog();loadChecked();setView('today');
<\/script>
</body>
</html>
